description: Comprehensive ASP.NET application monitoring dashboard with request performance, response metrics, connection stats, runtime diagnostics, and outgoing HTTP call tracking.
title: ASP.NET Metrics Dashboard

widgets.description: Current CPU usage of the ASP.NET application process
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Incoming HTTP requests per second
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.title: Average Request Latency

widgets.description: HTTP error rate (4xx and 5xx responses) over time

filter.expression: deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name AND namespace = $namespace AND http_response_status_code >= 400
